title: Bridge Essay: Schizophrenia and the bodily self.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Schizophrenia, and, the, bodily, self..

**Schizophrenia and the bodily self.** — Schizophr Res. PMID: 38815468. DOI: 10.1016/j.schres.2024.05.014. Despite the historically consolidated psychopathological perspective, on the one hand, contemporary organicistic psychiatry often highlights abnormalities in neurotransmitter systems like dysregulation of dopamine transmission, neural circuitry, and genetic factors as key contributors to schizophrenia. Neuroscience, on the other, has so far almost entirely neglected the first-person experiential dimension of this syndrome, mainly focusing on high-order cognitive functions, such as executive func
